name: icsme-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for IEEE ICSME (International Conference on Software Maintenance and Evolution): routing a maintenance/evolution paper among the SE venues, the single-round research track with its early-decision cut and author-response rebuttal, double-anonymous EasyChair submission on the IEEEtran two-column 10+2 budget, the Journal-First (J1C2) and Registered Reports and RENE tracks, mining-software-repositories and technical-debt evidence, and the Joint Artifact Evaluation + ROSE Festival IEEE badges. Grounded in the ICSME 2026 researchr call, IEEE Xplore, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
